nodes.name: LLM Synthesis: Market Analysis
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID with your n8n OpenAI credential ID. Find it in n8n > Settings > Credentials > your OpenAI credential > the numeric ID in the URL. The chatModel field defaults to gpt-4o — update if your runtime uses a different model.

storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — signal extraction, prompt building, and LLM synthesis run in both modes. In cloud mode: (1) shopify_import is read from the n8n trigger input payload instead of disk, (2) AJV schema validation is skipped, (3) artifact write and checkpoint update are skipped. market_intelligence is returned inline.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1 (after build-store-profile). Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, store_profile, normalized_intake_payload, runtime_config [, shopify_import (cloud/optional)] }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_name, artifact_path, market_intelligence, runtime_config, status, notes [, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings] }
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in 'LLM Synthesis: Market Analysis' with your n8n OpenAI credential ID.
Self-hosted: ensure STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH points to the schemas/ directory and ajv@8 is installed in n8n node_modules.
Cloud mode: OpenAI credential must be configured in n8n. shopify_import must be forwarded inline from orchestrate-phase1's Prepare Market Intel Input node.
cloudSkipped: AJV schema validation — no local schema files in n8n Cloud
Artifact write (market-intelligence.json) — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
Checkpoint update — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
notes: All LLM outputs are synthesis-based planning hypotheses — not confirmed market research.
catalog_context (shopify_import) improves synthesis quality but is not required. Without it, market_subcategories is omitted.
competitor_urls from intake are used as labeling hints for LLM archetype classification only — not crawled.
media_opportunities is intentionally not synthesized here — deferred to build-media-plan.
Temperature 0.3 for deterministic structured output. Max tokens 2000 covers all required schema fields.
